programme.title: The Wrath of Vajra
programme.desc: A Japanese death cult is ordered to destroy the spirit of China during World War II.

programme.title: Ip Man: The Awakening
programme.desc: After stopping a kidnapping, a young Ip Man becomes the target of a human trafficking ring.

programme.title: The Unity of Heroes
programme.desc: A martial artist battles zombielike foes who are impervious to pain.

programme.title: Young Ip Man
programme.desc: Young Ip Man moves to Hong Kong to study and ends up facing a hostage situation.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: A teen becomes trapped in a notorious intergalactic prison inside a video game.

programme.title: The Wrath of Vajra
programme.desc: A Japanese death cult is ordered to destroy the spirit of China during World War II.

programme.title: The Swordsman
programme.desc: A swordsman who is going blind is forced to raise his sword again to save his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Striking Rescue
programme.desc: A veteran Muay Thai expert goes on a mission of revenge after his wife and daughter are murdered.

programme.title: Furie
programme.desc: When traffickers kidnap her daughter, a vengeful mother returns to her outlaw roots to get her back.

programme.title: God of War
programme.desc: A commander and a general join forces to battle pillaging pirates in 16th-century China.

programme.title: God of War 2
programme.desc: Healer Seon-ui befriends a divine substance, Il-yeo-po, before Dong Zhuo's soldiers take it.

programme.title: The Swordsman
programme.desc: A swordsman who is going blind is forced to raise his sword again to save his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Striking Rescue
programme.desc: A veteran Muay Thai expert goes on a mission of revenge after his wife and daughter are murdered.

programme.title: Striking Rescue
programme.desc: A veteran Muay Thai expert goes on a mission of revenge after his wife and daughter are murdered.

programme.title: Furie
programme.desc: When traffickers kidnap her daughter, a vengeful mother returns to her outlaw roots to get her back.

programme.title: God of War
programme.desc: A commander and a general join forces to battle pillaging pirates in 16th-century China.

programme.title: God of War 2
programme.desc: Healer Seon-ui befriends a divine substance, Il-yeo-po, before Dong Zhuo's soldiers take it.

programme.title: Dr. Cheon and Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Dr. Cheon makes a living performing fake exorcisms, and is hired for a powerful possession case.

programme.title: Jiang Ziya: Legend of Deification
programme.desc: A banished warrior must slay a demon to return to the heavenly realm and become a god.

programme.title: Shadow
programme.desc: A brilliant general devises an intricate plan to finally achieve victory over a rival kingdom.

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: A vengeful crime boss forms an unlikely partnership with a detective to catch a serial killer.

programme.title: Seobok: Project Clone
programme.desc: As Ki-heon meets a cloned human, Seo Bok, his restless journey begins.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Filmmakers showcase the kung fu stuntmen and action directors in Hong Kong during the 1960s-'80s.
